label: honest
text: The cafe showed clear printed prices and my bill matched the order.

label: honest
text: My Grab driver followed the app and the fare matched the estimate.

label: honest
text: Reception confirmed my booking and helped me check in with no surprise fees.

text: I confirmed the amount before buying at the stall and paid exactly that.

label: honest
text: The airport bus booth posted a fixed fare and gave me a ticket receipt.

label: alarm
text: The driver refuses to start the meter and only offers a fixed price after I get in that feels much higher than a ride-hailing estimate.

label: alarm
text: Someone insists I hold bird food for a photo around Hoan Kiem Lake, a photo is taken before any price is mentioned, then payment is demanded afterwards.

label: alarm
text: A stranger says my hotel is closed or full and pushes a different hotel they know while discouraging me from calling my hotel.

label: alarm
text: A street changer offers a better-than-bank rate, counts very fast in a crowd, and insists I put money away before recounting.

label: alarm
text: A stranger sold me a cheap tour and demanded full payment upfront in cash with no company name, license, or reviews I can check.
